name: Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. engages in the design, production, and sale of gold, jewelry, and other precious metal crafts in China. The company was formerly known as Beijing Kingee Culture Development Ltd. and changed its name Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. in July 2010. Beijing Kingee Culture Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
